# Don't Touch Purple

> A fast reflex-grid browser game: tap every safe cell, never touch purple, survive boss events, climb the leaderboard.

Don't Touch Purple is a production React + TypeScript browser game at https://game.mscarabia.com. It uses a pure TypeScript game engine, React UI, Vite, Firebase, Cloudflare Workers, OGL/WebGL backgrounds, achievements, daily challenges, cosmetics, a dust economy, bot assist, signed challenge links, and a global leaderboard.

## Canonical URLs

- Live game: https://game.mscarabia.com
- Repository: https://github.com/defaltadmin/donttouchpurple

## Current architecture

- App shell: `App.tsx`
- React entry: `main.tsx`
- Pure engine: `engine/GameEngine.ts`
- Engine types: `engine/types.ts`
- Tick processing: `engine/subsystems/TickProcessor.ts`
- Cell lifecycle: `engine/subsystems/CellLifecycle.ts`
- Bot AI: `engine/subsystems/BotController.ts`
- React bridge: `hooks/useGameEngine.ts`
- Firebase services: `services/firebase.ts`
- Score validation Worker: `workers/score-validator.ts`
- Backgrounds: `components/Backgrounds/`
- HUD: `components/HUD/`
- Screens: `components/Screens/`
- Styles: `styles/game.css`, `styles/enhancements.css`, `styles/fx-enhancements.css`

## Product features

- Classic and Evolve game modes
- Touch, keyboard, and gamepad input
- 50+ achievements
- Daily challenges and weekly reward tasks
- Global leaderboard backed by Firebase
- Signed challenge links
- Dust economy and cosmetics shop
- Bot assist system
- Boss events: Storm, Inversion, Blackout, Shield Boss
- 22 animated background themes using CSS, canvas, and OGL/WebGL
- Reduced-motion and Lite Mode support
- PWA-ready static deployment

## Design system

The visual direction is Hyper-Juice Arcade: deep space indigo surfaces, neon magenta/pink/gold accents, glass panels, tactile 3D buttons, and high-feedback micro-interactions.

Primary palette:
- Space indigo: `#151028`
- Primary pink: `#fda9ff`
- Secondary pink: `#f3aeff`
- Gold: `#f9bd22`
- Magenta: `#c026d3`

## Quality gates

Before shipping changes:

```bash
pnpm typecheck
pnpm lint --max-warnings=0
pnpm test
pnpm build
```

Expected state:
- TypeScript: 0 errors
- ESLint: 0 warnings
- Tests: 230+ passing
- Production build succeeds
